enrichment.summary: Kyle films a casual vlog from his room in Boulder, explaining why he skipped yesterday's video — he was busy working on his '25 area dimensions' webpage. He talks about needing to finish his site, sell his car with his mom's help, and mentions he's been doing circles (walking/running routes) and may do a green screen video next.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: was too motivated to work on his website to bother filming
wants his mom's involvement because it's partly her money on the line
needs to finish the surface level before going deeper
